creator: bapt@FreeBSD.org
text:
did you try WITH_GCC or USE_GCC, if you tried USE_GCC it is wrong, you
should try WITH_GCC.

I just performed the build successfully with WITH_GCC on 9.1-RELEASE
amd64, 10-CURRENT (as of 2 weeks ago) 9.0-RELEASE i386.
Build was succesfull and running is just as expected

regards,
Bapt
